title: What Linux software is available on College of Engineering (COE) systems?
plain_text: The article provides a list of the available Linux software that is installed on the COE's Gateway machines. Available software: clang -v 3.5, clang++ - version 3.5, dineroIV, eclipse, emacs, epine, gcc 4.8.5 (Gateway), 10.20(COEnet), 8.5.0(Rocky), Intel-cc, lli, llvm-as, llvm-dis, m2s - version 3.4, matlab -version R2018a, Mathematica, pin, Pycharm, QtSpim, Riscy, Simplescalar, SolarsStudio, spim -version 9.0.5, xspim. Note: To install other software available on the gateway machines, search /COEnet/Linux. Additional programs are installed by default on CentOS 7. Help: For additional information, please email help@coe.neu.edu.
body_html:
The article provides a list of the available Linux software that is installed on the COE's Gateway machines.

Available software

  • clang -v 3.5
  • clang++ - version 3.5
  • dineroIV
  • eclipse
  • emacs
  • epine
  • gcc 4.8.5 (Gateway), 10.20(COEnet), 8.5.0(Rocky)
  • Intel-cc
  • lli
  • llvm-as
  • llvm-dis
  • m2s - version 3.4
  • matlab -version R2018a
  • Mathematica
  • pin
  • Pycharm
  • QtSpim
  • Riscy
  • Simplescalar
  • SolarsStudio
  • spim -version 9.0.5
  • xspim

Note: To install other software available on the gateway machines, search /COEnet/Linux. Additional programs are installed by default on CentOS 7.

Help

For additional information, please email help@coe.neu.edu.

Note: To install other software available on the gateway machines, search /COEnet/Linux. Additional programs are installed by default on CentOS 7.
